overall.description: A first-person walk through GTA V's Del Perro beach area during a vibrant sunset, beginning on a palm-lined promenade, passing through urban streets with beach shops, and ending on the wooden pier boardwalk with the Ferris wheel visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachfront promenade with palm trees and decorative fence

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wide promenade with palm trees lining both sides

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the promenade
ornate metal fence with geometric patterns separating the promenade from the beach
green metal benches facing the beach
city buildings visible in the distance against the sunset sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide, paved beachfront promenade during a vibrant sunset. Tall palm trees line both sides while a decorative metal fence runs along the right. The camera walks steadily forward with few pedestrians visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner with beach shops and graffiti-covered walls

events.description: turns from open promenade into street with buildings and parked cars

agents.ego_description: walking past beach shops and pedestrians on the sidewalk, turning right at the corner

notable_agents.action: standing on sidewalk near the graffiti building entrance
walking toward camera wearing light blue shorts

entered.detail: low-rise building with red and white walls covered in graffiti and murals
vintage-style black metal street lamp with glass globe
white sedan and other vehicles parked along the street

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the open promenade to an urban street corner. The camera turns right past a graffiti-covered building with pedestrians on the sidewalk. Parked cars line the street while the sunset creates long shadows across the concrete.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to Del Perro Pier tower building

agents.ego_description: walking toward the distinctive tower building with the sun setting directly behind it

notable_agents.action: walking away from camera toward the tower building

entered.detail: distinctive multi-story pier building with cylindrical tower and blue trim, silhouetted against sunset

segments.scene_description: The camera continues forward as the Del Perro Pier tower building looms ahead, backlit by the intense orange and pink sunset. The graffiti building falls behind while palm trees now line the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier tower stairs and boardwalk entrance

events.description: transitions from concrete path to wooden stairs and boardwalk
enters shadow cast by the tower building, reducing direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking up the stairs and ramp around the tower building, passing groups of people

notable_agents.action: group of four people standing and conversing on the wooden stairs
person sitting on bench under yellow umbrella

entered.detail: wide wooden staircase with metal railings leading up to the boardwalk
weathered wooden planks of the pier boardwalk

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the stairs around the tower building, transitioning from concrete to wooden boardwalk. Groups of pedestrians gather on the stairs while the building casts long shadows. The wooden planks of the pier become visible as the camera reaches the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden pier boardwalk with amusement park view

events.description: fully enters open wooden boardwalk with clear view of ocean and amusement park

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden boardwalk toward the Ferris wheel and amusement park rides

entered.detail: large illuminated Ferris wheel at the end of the pier
roller coaster tracks and carnival rides silhouetted against the sunset sky
row of colorful shop fronts and arcades along the right side

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens onto the wide wooden boardwalk of Del Perro Pier. The Ferris wheel and amusement park rides stand silhouetted against the dramatic sunset sky ahead. The tower building now falls behind on the right as the camera walks toward the carnival attractions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide beachfront promenade into the heart of a vibrant carnival pier during a dramatic sunset. It begins by walking steadily forward along a paved path lined with tall palm trees and a decorative metal fence, before turning right at an urban corner past a graffiti-covered building and parked cars. As the camera continues, the graffiti fades behind and the Del Perro Pier tower looms ahead, backlit by intense orange and pink hues that cast long shadows across the concrete. The scene then shifts as the camera ascends a set of stairs crowded with pedestrians, transitioning from the city pavement onto the weathered wooden planks of the pier. Finally, the tower building falls to the right as the camera opens onto the wide boardwalk, moving toward the silhouetted Ferris wheel and amusement park rides against the glowing sky.
